youtube_id: TBD — upload blocked by daily quota; video ready at out-spinner-r4/spinner-wheel-r4-narrated-v2.webm; supersedes 7bbzdJ9hx6g

pronunciation_map.Present (verb /prəˈzent/): Use 'Hit Present to go live' — the 'to go live' context cues ElevenLabs to stress the verb form prih-ZENT, not the noun PREZ-ent

notes: AKB-15 r4 — SINGLE VOICE throughout: Alice only (Xb7hH8MSUJpSbSDYk0k2). No Liam. CORRECTIONS from r3: (1) scenario sw-welcome and sw-autofill descriptions corrected from 'participants submit entries' to 'scan QR + enter name to join'; (2) s08 uses 'Hit Present to go live' for verb pronunciation /prəˈzent/. New visual re-recorded with corrected scenario text. Supersedes 7bbzdJ9hx6g (r3). YouTube upload blocked by daily account quota on 2026-06-16 — Chau to upload out-spinner-r4/spinner-wheel-r4-narrated-v2.webm manually and update article embed + this youtube_id field.

steps.display_text: Participants scan your QR code, enter their name, and the wheel fills itself. Spin to pick a winner live.
steps.tts_text: Participants scan your QR code, enter their name, and the wheel fills itself. Spin to pick a winner live.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Spinner Wheel from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.
steps.tts_text: Select Spinner Wheel from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.

steps.display_text: Check Participant name autofill — participants scan your QR code, enter their name to join, and the wheel fills itself automatically.
steps.tts_text: Tick Participant name autofill. Scan QR, enter name to join — wheel fills itself.

steps.display_text: Or prefer a fixed list? Type entries one per line in the Entries field, or paste a whole list at once.
steps.tts_text: Or prefer a fixed list? Type entries one per line in the Entries field, or paste a whole list at once.

steps.display_text: Click Save — each entry appears as a coloured segment on the wheel.
steps.tts_text: Click Save — each entry appears as a coloured segment on the wheel.

steps.display_text: Use Spin time to set how long the wheel spins — up to 1,200 seconds for maximum suspense.
steps.tts_text: Spin time controls how long the wheel spins — up to twelve hundred seconds.

steps.display_text: Hit Present to go live — then press the centre of the wheel, and the winner is revealed!
steps.tts_text: Hit Present to go live — then press the centre of the wheel, and the winner is revealed!

mix_command: cd ~/AhaSlides/onboarding-videos && ffmpeg -y -i out-spinner-r4/spinner-wheel-r4-final.webm -i out-spinner-r4/s01_v2.mp3 -i out-spinner-r4/s02.mp3 -i out-spinner-r4/s03.mp3 -i out-spinner-r4/s04_v6.mp3 -i out-spinner-r4/s05.mp3 -i out-spinner-r4/s06.mp3 -i out-spinner-r4/s07.mp3 -i out-spinner-r4/s08.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=0|0[a1];[2:a]adelay=7000|7000[a2];[3:a]adelay=11000|11000[a3];[4:a]adelay=15500|15500[a4];[5:a]adelay=22000|22000[a5];[6:a]adelay=29300|29300[a6];[7:a]adelay=34600|34600[a7];[8:a]adelay=39900|39900[a8];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7][a8]amix=inputs=8:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k out-spinner-r4/spinner-wheel-r4-narrated-v2.webm
